mapper.data:
{
  "username": "{{replace(lower(72.data.data.records[1].fields.`Selection Name`); space; emptystring)}}",
  "name": "{{replace(lower(72.data.data.records[1].fields.`Selection Name`); space; emptystring)}}",
  "first_name": "{{first(split(72.data.data.records[1].fields.`Selection Name`; space))}}",
  "last_name": "{{last(split(72.data.data.records[1].fields.`Selection Name`; space))}}",
  "email": "{{replace(lower(72.data.data.records[1].fields.`Selection Name`); space; emptystring)}}@{{38.data.data.records[].fields.`Root Domain`}}",
  "password": "{{uuid}}",
  "roles": ["author"]
}
